---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<!-- ── HERO ── -->
<section class="hero-dot-bg" style="min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:0 6vw;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:1.75rem;">
    <span class="badge-live"><span class="dot"></span>from0tohero.dev</span>
  </div>

  <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(3rem,8vw,6.5rem);font-weight:800;line-height:1.02;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;">
    Du terrain.<br>
    <span class="text-gradient">Pas des slides.</span>
  </h1>

  <p style="font-size:1.08rem;color:var(--f-text-2);max-width:480px;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:3rem;">
    Articles, réalisations et profils de praticiens tech —<br>
    Data, DevOps, Cloud, IA, Cybersécurité, Dev.
  </p>

  <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <a href="praticiens/index.html" class="btn-f btn-f-primary">Voir les praticiens →</a>
    <a href="soumettre/index.html" class="btn-f btn-f-secondary">Soumettre mon profil</a>
  </div>

</section>

<hr class="f-hr">

<!-- ── STATS ── -->
<section style="padding:3.5rem 6vw;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">
  <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4rem;">
    <div><p class="stat-num">1</p><p class="stat-label">Praticien</p></div>
    <div><p class="stat-num">1</p><p class="stat-label">Pays</p></div>
    <div><p class="stat-num">1</p><p class="stat-label">Réalisation</p></div>
    <div><p class="stat-num">0</p><p class="stat-label">Articles</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="f-hr">

<!-- ── COMMENT ÇA MARCHE ── -->
<section style="padding:5.5rem 6vw;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">

  <span class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:.5rem;">// comment ça marche</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3vw,2.4rem);font-weight:800;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:.4rem 0 3rem 0;">
    Figurer sur from0tohero.dev en 3 étapes.
  </h2>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:1.25rem;">

    <div class="f-card" style="cursor:default;">
      <div class="step-num">01</div>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:0 0 .6rem 0;">Crée ton profil</h3>
      <p style="font-size:.85rem;color:var(--f-text-2);line-height:1.75;margin:0 0 1.25rem 0;">Nom, rôle, stack, bio et liens. C'est l'étape fondatrice — elle ancre tout le reste sur la plateforme.</p>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;color:var(--f-text-3);">⏱ ~2 minutes</span>
    </div>

    <div class="f-card" style="cursor:default;">
      <div class="step-num">02</div>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:0 0 .6rem 0;">Soumets une réalisation ou un article</h3>
      <p style="font-size:.85rem;color:var(--f-text-2);line-height:1.75;margin:0 0 1.25rem 0;">Pipeline, dashboard, API, bootcamp, article Medium ou LinkedIn — ce que tu as vraiment construit.</p>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;color:var(--f-text-3);">Optionnel · illimité</span>
    </div>

    <div class="f-card" style="cursor:default;">
      <div class="step-num done">03</div>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:0 0 .6rem 0;">Publication sous 48h</h3>
      <p style="font-size:.85rem;color:var(--f-text-2);line-height:1.75;margin:0 0 1.25rem 0;">Ton profil apparaît dans l'annuaire. Visible par des milliers de praticiens et recruteurs.</p>
      <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;color:var(--f-green);">✓ Délai max · 48h</span>
    </div>

  </div>

</section>

<hr class="f-hr">

<!-- ── BOOTCAMPS ── -->
<section style="padding:5.5rem 6vw;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">

  <span class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:.5rem;">// bootcamps</span>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3vw,2.4rem);font-weight:800;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:.4rem 0 2.5rem 0;">Apprendre par la pratique</h2>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:1.25rem;">

    <a href="https://diakite-data.github.io/data-engineering-bootcamp/" class="f-card-link" target="_blank">
      <div class="f-card f-card-hover">
        <span class="badge-live" style="margin-bottom:1.25rem;"><span class="dot"></span>live</span>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:.75rem 0 .5rem 0;">Data Engineering</h3>
        <p style="font-size:.83rem;color:var(--f-text-2);margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;line-height:1.6;">Python · Airflow · dbt · Spark · GCP · Kafka</p>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:1.5rem;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.67rem;color:var(--f-text-3);flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <span>35 modules</span><span>1 100+ apprenants</span><span>40+ pays</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>

    <a href="https://da.from0tohero.dev" class="f-card-link" target="_blank">
      <div class="f-card" style="opacity:.72;">
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--f-text-3);display:block;margin-bottom:1.25rem;">○ coming soon</span>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:0 0 .5rem 0;">Data Analyst</h3>
        <p style="font-size:.83rem;color:var(--f-text-2);margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;line-height:1.6;">SQL · Python · Power BI · Tableau · Stats</p>
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.67rem;color:var(--f-text-3);">En construction</span>
      </div>
    </a>

  </div>

</section>

<hr class="f-hr">

<!-- ── COMMUNAUTÉ ── -->
<section style="padding:5.5rem 6vw;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">
  <div class="community-strip" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:2rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">

    <div style="max-width:560px;">
      <span class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:.6rem;">// la communauté</span>
      <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2rem);font-weight:800;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:.4rem 0 .8rem 0;line-height:1.15;">
        La première communauté de praticiens tech francophones.
      </h2>
      <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:var(--f-text-2);line-height:1.8;margin:0;">
        Une communauté construite autour de ceux qui font — pas de ceux qui parlent.
      </p>
    </div>

    <a href="praticiens/index.html" class="btn-f btn-f-sky" style="flex-shrink:0;">Voir la communauté →</a>

  </div>
</section>
```
